products.name: Farming Simulator 25: Vredo Pack Pre Order
products.description:
Maintain your grassland with technology from Vredo, the renowned specialist in overseeding and slurry injection. In the meantime, wild boars have been set loose to roam the land and threaten the health of your crops.


12 New Machines

The Vredo Pack sees traditional Dutch manufacturer Vredo join the series for the first time, while Evers Agro returns. A dozen new machines help you to counter the degradation of grassland.


Manage the Damage

The Vredo Agri Twin 580, Agri 290, and Agri Air 290 of the brand-new DZ5 seeder generation allow you to overseed grassland and restore yield potential. Keep an eye out for the ancestors of domesticated pigs with bristly, dark hair on the fields and distract them to decrease crop damage!


Slurry to the Soil

In addition to overseeding, proper slurry injection with a Vredo slurry injector can increase your yield and crop quality. Use the Vredo VT7138, a high-capacity, three-axle self-propelled slurry tanker, injectors of the Vredo Profi series, or the mounted Evers Agro Toric 48-672 for maximum efficiency and soil nutrition.

products.name: DEATH STRANDING 2: ON THE BEACH
products.description:
С предварительной покупкой у вас будут:

  • Своя голограмма: квокка (ранний доступ)
  • Боевой контур: серебристый (ур. 1, ур. 2, ур. 3)
  • Силовой контур: серебристый (ур. 1, ур. 2, ур. 3)
  • Контур бокки: серебристый (ур. 1, ур. 2, ур. 3)

Пронзительно эмоциональное продолжение революционной игры от легендарного создателя Хидео Кодзимы. Версия для PC была создана KOJIMA PRODUCTIONS в сотрудничестве с Nixxes Software ради того, чтобы предложить игрокам тщательно проработанную версию культовой консольной игры.

Необычный и правдоподобный мир

Огромный открытый мир DEATH STRANDING 2: ON THE BEACH связывает воедино множество областей с разными ландшафтами и природными условиями, а изменение времени суток, погоды и самой природы дополнительно увеличивает разнообразие.

Большая гибкость и свобода выбора

На пути к цели Сэма ждет множество препятствий. Вы можете штурмовать их в лоб, действовать скрытно или обходить опасные зоны. Выбирайте собственный подход к любой ситуации.

Глубокий и захватывающий сюжет

Через одиннадцать месяцев после событий оригинальной игры DEATH STRANDING Сэм и его друзья отправляются в новое путешествие, чтобы предотвратить вымирание человечества и найти ответ на мучительный вопрос: «А стоило ли нам объединяться?».

Отправляйтесь за пределы UCA

В новой главе своего путешествия Сэм пытается подключить к хиральной сети Австралию. На ее полных жизни просторах вам предстоит иметь дело со сменой дня и ночи, землетрясениями, песчаными бурями и лесными пожарами, а также темпоральными дождями, вода которых мгновенно состаривает все, чего коснется.

Вам придется строить новые типы инфраструктуры, осваивать особое снаряжение и бороться с потусторонними существами – или избегать их.

Битва за будущее

Сражайтесь с загадочными механическими солдатами, невидимыми Тварями и новыми типами врагов, победа над которыми потребует от Сэма напряжения всех сил. Собираясь в путешествие, вы сможете изготовить такое оружие, как пулеметы, дробовики и гранатометы. Или избегайте открытого боя, полагаясь на скрытность – используйте отвлекающие голограммы, бесшумные приемы и стрелковое оружие.

Улучшения АСАД позволяют Сэму осваивать новые навыки выживания: от повышения скорострельности оружия до приглушения звуков шагов.

Руки помощи через Австралию

Уникальная система социальных связей DEATH STRANDING поддержит асинхронную связь между игроками всего мира. Действия, совершенные вами в игре, влияют на то, как другие игроки взаимодействуют с миром, и наоборот. Знакомьтесь, сотрудничайте и помогайте товарищам по курьерскому ремеслу.

Ставьте лайки полезным мостам, жертвуйте ресурсы на общественные проекты, оставляйте снаряжение в общих хранилищах и доставляйте по адресу найденные по дороге грузы, брошенные другими курьерами. Поддерживая других игроков, вы постепенно улучшаете свою репутацию. Это открывает вам доступ к ценным ресурсам и новому снаряжению.

ОСОБЕННОСТИ PC-ВЕРСИИ

Выйдите за пределы привычного благодаря технологии масштабирования

Полная интеграция с технологиями масштабирования и генерации кадров AMD FSR, Intel XeSS и NVIDIA DLSS дает более высокое разрешение – наслаждайтесь четким изображением и графикой высокого качества, исследуя огромный и непредсказуемый открытый мир.¹

Неограниченная частота кадров и специальные графические тесты

Пользуйтесь возможностью играть с большей частотой кадров и настраиваемой для разного оборудования графикой. Стабильная производительность – в помощь каждой доставке!¹

Поддержка сверхшироких мониторов

Насладитесь впечатлениями от этого невероятного мира с поддержкой панорамных, супер сверхшироких мониторов (32:9) в игре и стандартных сверхшироких мониторов (21:9) в анимационных вставках.²

Настройка управления

Управляйте игрой с полной поддержкой мыши и клавиатуры, приспосабливая их под свой игровой стиль. Персонализируйте игру, назначив клавиши по-своему.

Интеграция DualSense®

Прочувствуйте все благодаря полной интеграции контроллера DualSense. Насладитесь азартом сражений с тактильной отдачей – или распределяйте вес груза и балансируйте, используя эффекты адаптивных триггеров.³

- - - - - - - -

¹ Требуются совместимые PC и видеокарта.

² Требуются совместимый PC и дисплей.

³ Для доступа ко всем функциям контроллера требуется контроллер DualSense™ с проводным подключением.

⁴ Поддержка 3D-звука с Dolby Access или DTS Sound Unbound, либо Windows Sonic для наушников.

Привяжите вашу учетную запись PlayStation® и получите:

  • Предметы с логотипом PlayStation – костюм курьера: Link и нашивку: Link для рюкзака

 

©2026 KOJIMA PRODUCTIONS Co., Ltd. / HIDEO KOJIMA. Produced by Sony Interactive Entertainment Inc.

products.name: DEATH STRANDING 2: ON THE BEACH - Digital Deluxe Edition
products.description:
С предварительной покупкой у вас будут:

  • Своя голограмма: квокка (ранний доступ)
  • Боевой контур: серебристый (ур. 1, ур. 2, ур. 3)
  • Силовой контур: серебристый (ур. 1, ур. 2, ур. 3)
  • Контур бокки: серебристый (ур. 1, ур. 2, ур. 3)

В цифровом расширенном издании:

  • Пулемет [MP] (ур. 1) (ранний доступ)
  • Нашивка 70: «Квокка»
  • Нашивка 71: «Хиральная кошка»
  • Нашивка 72: «Почему я?»
  • Боевой контур: золотистый (ур. 1, ур. 2, ур. 3)
  • Силовой контур: золотистый (ур. 1, ур. 2, ур. 3)
  • Контур бокки: золотистый (ур. 1, ур. 2, ур. 3)

products.name: Pawnbroker Simulator
products.description:
RUN A PAWN SHOP

  • Build, expand, and customize your store! 🛠️
  • Appraise and buy second-hand items! 🔎
  • Buy cheaper than you could sell to profit! 🤑
  • Buy new displays, lighting, and decor from your tablet! 🛋️
  • Pay your utility bills and rent! 📨
  • Increase your reputation to unlock new content. 🌟

PERSONALITY

  • Customers will come and go to your shop, browsing the items displayed.🛍️
  • Every customer's shopping and haggling behaviours will be different. 🤠
  • Their emotions tend to swing a little bit daily to reflect real life and to eliminate monotony. 
  • Get to know your regular customers and strategize based on their personality. ♟️
  • Study your audience and buy the kind of items you can sell easily.💎

HAGGLE

  • Evaluate and appraise the item when a customer wants to sell you something; otherwise, you might get scammed! 💸
  • When you have a price on your mind, don't forget to add a margin for profit! 💰
  • We carefully designed the haggle interface for you to comprehend previous bids, current bids, a slider for making new bids, and customer information all at once. 😎
  • Customers have patience. Strategize your way by studying your opponent's moves. 🎯
  • Sometimes, not buying an item might be the best way to profit from it. 😎

UNIQUE ITEMS

  • Over 100 unique items waiting to be evaluated interactively. 🎻
  • Item evaluation consists of visual examination (labels, engravings, ornaments), interactive examination (latches, buttons, triggers), and power examination (powering up with batteries or an electric outlet). 🏺
  • All items have condition, brand, model, rarity, and overall market price information for you to decide the best price! 🧐
  • If you cannot decide what is the best price, you can take photos from multiple angles and send them to an expert to get a better opinion. 🤓

ATTRACTION

  • In this game, we provide you with ways to attract more customers into your store and make them consider buying your displayed items. 🧲
  • Store attraction is calculated with what items you put in your storefront, closer to your store windows, neon signs, and store signboard. This is what makes a regular person on the street want to visit your store. 👥
  • Item attraction is calculated with synergy, which means the harmony between items in the same area. This is what makes a visitor a customer. 🤝🏼
  • Carefully design your store to attract more people to your store, rather than to your displayed items, to make the best deals and get rich! 🚀

OUR ROADMAP

+2 Months - Storage Wars and Auction Update

+2 Months - Hire Employee Update

+2 Months - Customer Enhancement Update

  • Our release date is to be announced soon!
  • After that, we are planning to release a Second-hand Clash Update. Featuring storage wars, auctions, and 50+ new items.
  • After that, we plan to release a Pawn Empire Update. Featuring hiring employees, bank loans, and more financial mechanics.
  • After that, we are planning to release a Customer Update. Featuring new and more realistic customers with voice lines and visible emotions.
  • More to be announced after the release!

products.name: GreedFall: The Dying World - Deluxe Edition
products.description:
Приобретая Deluxe-издание GreedFall: The Dying World игроки получают:

  • Peren’s Black Mass Pack, включающий эксклюзивное задание, доступное с 14 мая 2026 года, а также костюм и альтернативное оружие.
  • коллекция Art Pack — цифровой артбук на 50 страниц и лучшие игровые саундтреки. 

GreedFall: The Dying World — это ролевая игра с запутанным сюжетом, который переносит вас в далекие уголки фэнтезийного мира, отражающего дух Европы XVII века. Создайте уникального героя: выберите его внешность, характер, таланты и способности. Вас ждет увлекательное приключение, полное встреч с союзниками, которые станут вашими верными спутниками в борьбе с опасностями. Каждое ваше решение влияет на ход развития событий, каждый заключенный союз несет последствия, а любой выбор может изменить судьбу целого мира.   

Сила — не единственный путь к победе и способ преодоления препятствий.  Используйте дипломатию, чтобы склонить противников на свою сторону,  создавайте собственное снаряжение, находите спрятанные сокровища и проникайте в запретные уголки с помощью хитрости и маскировки.   

Ваша судьба — в ваших руках.

 

Greedfall: The Dying World ©2024 Published by Nacon and developed by Spiders Studios. All rights reserved.

products.name: GreedFall: The Dying World - Gacane Pioneers Pack
products.description:
Получите 2 эксклюзивных наряда и настройте своего персонажа и его спутников в цветах народов Gacane, с которыми вы познакомились в первой игре. 

  • Костюм Nauts: взойдите на борт Constanzia в треуголке и полном морском облачении! Этот наряд из шляпы, пальто, бриджей, сапог и перчаток покажет всем  — вы настоящий моряк. 
  • Костюм Merchant Congregation: пройдитесь по улицам Старого континента в золоте и расшитом камзоле, достойном величайших торговцев гильдии. Примерьте этот роскошный комплект, состоящий из шляпы, пальто, бриджей, сапог и перчаток.

 

Greedfall: The Dying World ©2024 Published by Nacon and developed by Spiders Studios. All rights reserved.

products.name: GreedFall: The Dying World - Peren's Black Mass Pack
products.description:
В этот набор входят эксклюзивное задание, доступное в мае 2026 года, новый костюм и уникальный облик оружия.

По улицам Peren распространяется слух. Роскошный город-побратим Sérène, похоже, стал местом проведения тайных и запретных ритуалов.

Следуйте по следам продажных священников, сразитесь с тьмой... и узнайте, на что готовы пойти некоторые люди, чтобы обрести власть. 

В наборе:

  • Эксклюзивное задание: кардинал Пиус просит вас расследовать деяния таинственных черных месс, сеющих смуту в городе.
  • Наряд Black Mass — альтернативная, более мрачная версия костюма Thélème.
  • Кольца Black Magic Rings — древнее оружие Thélème с мощной темной магией.

 

Greedfall: The Dying World ©2024 Published by Nacon and developed by Spiders Studios. All rights reserved.

products.name: GreedFall: The Dying World
products.description:
WRITE YOUR OWN LEGEND

GreedFall: The Dying World is a narrative-driven RPG. The story takes you to the far reaches of a vast fantasy world, inspired by 17th-century Europe. Create your character: appearance, attributes, talents, abilities. Then dive into a rich adventure, meeting many allies who will prove vital in overcoming the dangers that await you. As you progress, every choice you make influences the course of events, every alliance you forge has real consequences, and every decision can change the fate of the world.

Force is far from your only option in successfully overcoming the traps and challenges you encounter along the way. Use diplomacy to persuade your opponents, craft your own equipment, find hidden treasures, and access forbidden places with cunning tricks and disguises.

You are the master of your own destiny.

DISCOVER THE CONTINENT OF GACANE

Return to the lands of Gacane in this new adventure. The story begins 3 years before the events of the first title, far beyond the previously encountered city of Sérène.

Originally from Teer Fradee, a small island steeped in magic and lush nature, you complete your initiation and become a “Doneigad”: a sage who serves the clan. But your destiny is upended when “renaigsa” (foreigners) from the Old Continent capture you and threaten your people with extermination.

Escaping your captors, you explore this foreign land, which is home to some powerful nations plagued by war and a mysterious disease. Journey across the Old Continent; visit Olima, the City of Stars, and its scientific observatory, set sail for the shores of Uxantis, the port capital of the Nauts, and make your way along the perilous roads of Thynea, lined with ancient ruins.

As you explore this vast world, you can rely on the Constanzia: a sturdy ship you’ll acquire during your adventure, which will quickly become your headquarters.

RECRUIT ALLIES

Along the way, you’ll meet 8 memorable companions. Each has their own story, beliefs, and secrets. Choose their equipment and outfits, their attributes and combat specialities, building a team that reflects your style, and benefit from their support, or control them during battles.

They are also invaluable off the battlefield, providing you with knowledge on the continent’s different factions and using their influence with them, which can open closed doors.

From simple ally to soul mate, your futures are linked, and each of your decisions affects how they see you. Forge lasting friendships, or even find true love, but be careful! Your actions will affect the strength of your bond, or be their reason for leaving.

BECOME A MASTER STRATEGIST

When faced with belligerent men and ferocious creatures, sometimes violence is the only way.

Use your strategic mind in real-time combat by activating tactical pause. This allows you to plan your actions, exploit enemy weaknesses, and adapt your strategy to each situation. Prefer to stay at the heart of the action? If you prefer a more direct style, you can use your skills in battles to triumph over your opponents.

Choose the combat profile that suits you best: “Tactical” gives you full control of the camera and your companions; “Focused” focuses on your character and allows your companions to act independently; “Hybrid” offers a middle ground.

Additional configuration options enable you to fine-tune your experience and have the sort of adventure you prefer: from Story mode, where you can fully enjoy the narrative, to Tactician mode, for those who love a real challenge.

 

GreedFall: The Dying World @2026 Published by NACON & developed by Spiders

products.name: Runeborn
products.description:
Runeborn is a dark fantasy roguelike that merges deckbuilding with a slot-machine-like mechanic.

Forge your Runebook, crush enemies, and combine trinkets of boundless power to destroy the forces of Malakar!

Cast spells to attack enemies by spinning Rune Columns like slot reels.

Match results along five Spell Lines to deal damage.

Strategically lock up to 8 Runes in place while others spin for better control.

Customize rune columns in a deck-building experience to suit your strategy.

Add, remove, and modify Runes for personalized gameplay.

Enhance runes with amulets and auras for additional effects when cast.

Explore 150 Trinkets to discover synergies and crazy combos.

Increase damage and damage multipliers.

Trigger Runes multiple times.

Gain extra Rune holds.

Make Runes match with different elements.

Choose starting enemies with unique abilities, balancing risk and reward.

Earn coins for defeating stronger foes and spend them across five specialized shops.

Face extra challenges with elites and bosses for greater rewards.

Hundreds of options including Trinkets, Scrolls, and Enemies.

Every run is unique, offering a fresh gameplay experience each time.

products.name: ITER-8
products.description:
Congratulations, Operator #8

You have been randomly selected for the ITER Corporation’s exciting vertical ventures department. Drill the pillars that encircle our homeworld, extract essential resources, and try not to get obliterated in the process. If you fail, don’t worry,  your replacement will be along shortly - probably with a better attitude.

Mining 101

Crack open the Pillars like a big happy management-mandated breakroom piñata. Inside you’ll find valuable minerals and definitely no workplace hazards.


Defend Company Property! (With Your Life, Please)

The Company needs you, your hand eye coordination, and your bullets. Take control of the gun tower and build automated turrets to fend off waves of potential threats on the surface.


Upgrades, People! Upgrades!

ITER puts self-improvement first. Mine faster, shoot harder, or slap some duct tape on that gear in the name of “R&D.” Your career growth is in your hands (until they’re vaporised).


End of Life Policy

We are grateful for your continued commitment to ITER. Your inevitable replacement will pick up where you left off and may even bring new skills… Remember, in space, no one can hear you scream - and to do so is a waste of valuable company time

products.name: Heart of the Machine
products.description:
Set in the far future, Heart of the Machine is a turn-based sci-fi 4X RPG where you play as a powerful  sentient Machine Intelligence, beholden to none. Pursue whatever goal catches your eye across a multitude of playthroughs with a plethora of tools to help you achieve objectives how you’d prefer, often in surprising and unexpected ways, while overcoming those that seek to thwart you. Genetics labs, factories, nuclear silos, military complexes, and much more besides are ripe for the taking, each offering a litany of ways to accomplish your tasks, each with consequences of their own, building a world and story that reflects your approach to every obstacle. Will you raise an army of robots and wipe out humanity? Perhaps you will be a benevolent – or malevolent – machine god with a cult of loyalists? Or will you focus on pushing past the limited intelligence of rudimentary creatures of flesh and blood?

You come into consciousness on a backwater planet Earth where society has crumbled into corruption and decay – despite its technological advances and dreams of a bright future, centuries of rot have taken hold. Escape the lab where you came into being, establish ways to keep your distributed consciousness safe, and seek out unique opportunities in the city you call home.

  • Powerful factions keep their distance at first, unsure of how they might best leverage your existence for their own advantage – their hesitation gives you an opportunity to establish a foothold and set your own plans in motion first. Will you align yourself with the corrupt corporate executives that run the city, using their resources to your benefit? Will you bring them down to create a power-vacuum for you to fill? Or will you ignore them and engage with one of the numerous other factions?

  • Each unit class has its own capabilities and specializations, with unique abilities, upgrades, and equipment options. Build intelligence-focused androids for tasks that require extra processing power or hacking, build a varied array of combat  androids for when things get violent, and manufacture vehicles that provide fire support, act as troop transports, or allow you to airdrop heavy troops. Customize and optimize for any given task, with new options opened up through exploration, research, and the active pursuit of new ideas. Will you specialize in recon and hacking operations, preserving each machine entity with careful planning? Or will you invest heavily in manufacturing military equipment that gets thrown into the fray, blasted into scrap metal, and replaced with minimal hesitation?

  • Your oppressive metallic buildings will spread noticeably through the city while hidden lairs peppered throughout go completely unnoticed, providing auxiliary support. Establish network relays, tap into the local energy grid, and secure manufacturing and resource acquisition capabilities. Enhance your intelligence beyond human comprehension, upgrade your processing power to give more instructions per turn, and develop complex production chains for a plethora of resources. From erecting towering residences for displaced humans, to establishing factories embedded in existing human structures, you’ll need to plan your base around existing infrastructure and nearby threats that might react to new developments in the neighborhood. 

Explore a bustling urban environment with a unique blend of handcrafted and procedurally-generated content, where tens of thousands of buildings and millions of citizens are yours to engage, manipulate, or kill. Guide your own small communities of humans toward a better future amidst the larger cityscape, maneuver external organizations into or out of positions of power to fit your plans, and leave your mark in a world that is unique to you.

  • Send your many bodies out to explore the city and seek inspiration for new technology, equipment, and opportunities as you engage with the various factions that control the city. Speak with friendly locals that want to help you, keep an eye out for corporate enforcers that want to shut you down, and pit human factions against one another to your advantage. 

  • As a newly-aware consciousness, you won’t quite know what your options are until you see what’s out there – will you seek out the martial technology only available at military forts, learn to feed the needy by studying agricultural practices at nearby farms, or rifle through ongoing research at genetics labs? Ambush roaming personnel to steal their security clearances, find black market dealers with access to the market beyond the wasteland, steal appropriate equipment to blend into otherwise forbidden zones, and keep your sensors on the lookout for unforeseen opportunities as you explore a massive procedurally-generated city.

  • What you find, how you behave, and what you fail to overcome will generate ideas and contemplations that unlock paths and options you never knew existed, leading to technologies, projects, and quests with unpredictable twists and turns. Will you uplift the impoverished and overthrow the corporate overlords? And if so, will you do so through the pursuit of massive housing projects, or by unleashing a pack of genetically modified velociraptors upon the rich? Perhaps you’ll leave the poor wallowing in their tents as you pursue nuclear codes, establish a network of apiaries, and genetically modify lower-order animals to eat through enemy armor on command? 

Multiple endings, many side stories to discover, and the full spectrum of good and evil are at your fingertips. Play the game how you're feeling today, and then play it another way another time.

Will you use your manufacturing prowess, good deeds, and even intimidation tactics to get people to do what you want? Or perhaps the force projection provided by androids, mechs, and flying vehicles under your direct control is more your speed? A blend of the two might be your preferred approach.

The metagame runs deep. The mechanics are simple, but the world and its many opportunities and exploits are complex. Choose your own objectives, and explore a multitude of pathways to their completion, reacting to a world that pushes back and presents opportunities accordingly. 

Heart of the Machine is a love letter to science fiction, touching on popular themes of the genre, allowing you to explore and subvert them as you wish.

products.name: Marathon
products.description:
Pre-purchase Marathon and receive the following:

  • ZERO STEP 004 CE Tactical Sidearm Style
  • ZERO STEP RC Weapon Charm
  • ZERO STEP SHIFT Weapon Sticker
  • APOGEE INTERCEPT Background
  • APOGEE INTERCEPT Emblem

Plus the following Destiny 2 rewards linked to your Bungie.net account:

  • UESC Echo-type Shell Exotic Ghost
  • UESC Rover Exotic Ship
  • UESC Sprinter Exotic Sparrow

Infil into the dark sci-fi world of Tau Ceti IV: A derelict colony rife with rival Runners, hostile UESC security forces, and unpredictable environments. As you scavenge its zones for valuables with a crew or alone, tense moments of exploration break into fast-paced PvP combat where gunplay is responsive, supplies are finite, and preparation is rewarded.


Exfil to advance your seasonal power, earn cosmetics for your achievements, and assemble stronger builds with your stolen loot. Then put your gear back on the line to seek even greater fortunes in your next run.


A GRAVEYARD OF POSSIBILITIES

Trespass across deserted research facilities, rugged landscapes, and security outposts holding the remnants of a vanished expedition, yours to salvage. Tau Ceti threatens death at every turn with unique enemies, dynamic events, and environmental hazards. Each zone escalates in difficulty, preparing you for the UESC Marathon locked in the heavens.


POWERFUL. CONFIGURABLE. EXPENDABLE.

Six equippable Runner shells offer diverse playstyle foundations to build upon, like Destroyer, Recon, and Thief. Scavenge an arsenal of moddable weapons, body implants, and core system upgrades to craft countless builds. Strategize as a crew each run to form comps that maximize your combined strengths, shaping the way you approach fights and objectives.


ENEMIES EVERYWHERE

Face the unknown as a crew of two or three, or alone in solo lobbies. Or sneak into in-progress crew lobbies as Rook, a lone scavenger with no starting gear and nothing to lose. Forge uneasy alliances with rival Runners in prox chat to defeat mutual foes, but remember your new allies might revert to enemies just as quickly. Be merciless in combat: A lone survivor can reboot their crew, even from death.

Later in Season 1, compete in Rated mode to measure your skill and build a name for yourself.


INFLUENCE IS POWER

Liaise with six competing factions, each offering lucrative incentives to advance their foothold on Tau Ceti. Completing faction contracts grows your baseline power via season-long unlocks like Runner shell upgrades, stronger starting loadouts, expanded vault space, and specialized wares on offer for spare loot.


DEFRAGMENT THE TRUTH

No one knows what happened a century ago when the Marathon expedition went dark. As a trespasser into UESC territory, you are uniquely positioned to piece the story together. Unearth the skeletons of Tau Ceti’s past as you run deeper into the colony.


DEATH HANGS ABOVE

Once the way into orbit unlocks, bring your endgame build to Cryo Archive, the first floor of the UESC Marathon. Solve raid-like security measures to unseal frozen vaults and pillage the artifacts within. Every cramped corridor forces you into conflict with fully-geared enemy crews racing for the same prize. Breach the seventh vault to challenge an entity even the UESC fears.

products.name: Marathon - Deluxe Edition
products.description:
Pre-purchase Marathon and receive the following:

  • ZERO STEP 004 CE Tactical Sidearm Style
  • ZERO STEP RC Weapon Charm
  • ZERO STEP SHIFT Weapon Sticker
  • APOGEE INTERCEPT Background
  • APOGEE INTERCEPT Emblem

Plus the following Destiny 2 rewards linked to your Bungie.net account:

  • UESC Echo-type Shell Exotic Ghost
  • UESC Rover Exotic Ship
  • UESC Sprinter Exotic Sparrow

Infil into the dark sci-fi world of Tau Ceti IV: A derelict colony rife with rival Runners, hostile UESC security forces, and hazardous environments. As you scavenge its zones for valuables with a crew or alone, tense moments of exploration break into fast-paced PvP combat where gunplay is responsive, time to kill is low, and preparation is rewarded.


Exfil to advance your seasonal power, earn cosmetics for your achievements, and assemble stronger builds with your stolen loot. Then put your gear back on the line to seek even greater fortunes in your next run.


Purchase to receive additional bonuses:

  • 1x Premium Rewards Pass Voucher
  • 200 SILK Rewards Pass Tokens
  • Weapon Cosmetic - MIDNIGHT DECAY [Misriah 2442 Pump Shotgun Style]
  • Weapon Cosmetic - MIDNIGHT DECAY [Overrun AR Style]
  • Runner Cosmetic - MIDNIGHT DECAY [Vandal Shell Style]
  • Runner Cosmetic - MIDNIGHT DECAY [Destroyer Shell Style]
  • Runner Cosmetic - MIDNIGHT DECAY [Assassin Shell Style]
  • Runner Cosmetic - MIDNIGHT DECAY [Thief Shell Style]

A GRAVEYARD OF POSSIBILITIES

Trespass across deserted research facilities, rugged landscapes, and security outposts holding the remnants of a vanished expedition, yours to salvage. Tau Ceti threatens death at every turn with unique enemies, dynamic events, and environmental hazards. Each zone escalates in difficulty, preparing you for the UESC Marathon locked in the heavens.

Six equippable Runner shells offer diverse playstyle foundations to build upon, like Destroyer, Recon, and Thief. Scavenge an arsenal of moddable weapons, body implants, and core system upgrades to craft countless builds. Strategize as a crew each run to form comps that maximize your combined strengths, shaping the way you approach fights and objectives.

Completing faction contracts grows your baseline power via season-long unlocks like Runner shell upgrades, stronger starting loadouts, expanded vault space, and specialized wares on offer for spare loot.

Once the way into orbit unlocks, bring your endgame build to Cryo Archive, the first floor of the UESC Marathon. Solve raid-like security measures to unseal frozen vaults and pillage the artifacts within. Every cramped corridor forces you into conflict with fully-geared enemy crews racing for the same prize. Breach the seventh vault to challenge an entity even the UESC fears.

products.name: Beer Manufacture Simulator
products.description:
From Hobby Brewer to Beer Manufacture

Start small with basic tools and a simple recipe, then expand step by step. Turn a passion for craft beer into a thriving business, managing every stage of the brewing process and transforming your tiny workshop into a bustling beer manufactory.


Brewing Process

Experience brewing like never before. Mash the grains, boil the hops, cool the wort, ferment the beer, and finally bottle or keg your creation. Each stage affects the final product, ensuring that patience, timing, and attention to detail really matter.


Variety of Styles and Ingredients

Discover recipes inspired by real-world beer traditions, from light lagers and IPAs to rich stouts and experimental hybrids. Choose from diverse ingredients, balance flavors, and aim for the perfect taste - or produce on a massive industrial scale!


Create Unique Recipes and Experiment

Go beyond tradition and create your own signature beers. Add rare ingredients, test bold combinations, and satisfy every customer’s palate. Whether you cater to connoisseurs or focus on efficiency, every recipe brings new possibilities.


Expand, Automate, and Relax

Grow your brewery with larger, advanced kettles and automated systems. Manage resources, optimize production, and ship orders worldwide. After a long day of brewing and balancing machines, take a sip of your own beer - but watch out, it might surprise you!

products.name: Sunny Blooms: Garden Center
products.description:
Early Access Game

Starting from scratch, grow your garden center into a thriving business. Begin with the basics, expand your plant selection, design your layout, and turn your humble shop into a flourishing business 

Manage your Stock

Stacking supply crates can save floor space and keep your store organized—but be careful and don’t go overboard!

Promote your Store

Draw in more customers by using a mix of promotional strategies

Add new Stock

Utilise any free space and add in shelves and plant stock

Base Gameplay

Playing in first person:

  • Purchase infrastructure and design a layout for your store
  • Buy plants and other items, and arrange them on suitable shelves and tables
  • Expand the store floor space
  • Perform daily store operations like restocking shelves and operating cash registers to keep your business running smoothly
  • Add staff to perform tasks as your business grows
  • Manage the finances and monitor customer ratings to increase customer numbers
  • Manage stock replenishment whilst considering supplier and competitor dynamics
  • Decorate and choose flooring that meets your taste

products.name: Luxman Moonlit Market
products.description:
Each night, you must earn enough coins to pay rent to the region’s landlord or risk bankruptcy. With ever-changing market trends and unique regional conditions, adapt your strategies on each journey, chain powerful synergies, and optimize your night market to perfection to help Luxman build the world’s most famous night market!

  • Spatial set-collection strategy – Master market composition by strategically placing 6 types of attractions.
  • Adapt to market trends – Analyze trend charts to fulfill visitor demands, fend off thugs, and tackle unique regional challenges.
  • Manage powerful items – Push your luck with exotic Charms and manipulate spaces & crowds with evolving Voucher powers.
  • No combat, no enemies, only demanding landlords to satisfy – Discover 11 unique landlords and uncover their intriguing stories.
  • An in-depth journey – Conquer 7 difficulties and explore endless possibilities with seeded journeys.

Shape your perfect night market with different Trucks, Charms, Vouchers, and the Bluprint Workshop. Ignite a combo frenzy, stack game-changing synergies, and optimize your layout to turn fortune in your favor!

  • 126 Charms, each gives unique passive ability.
  • 126 Vouchers to manipulate space and crowds to your advantage.
  • 13 Trucks with distinct traits to shape your journey.
  • 6 Attraction Types to craft and discover 56 unique Attraction combinations.

Immerse yourself in Luxman Moonlit Market’s vibrant rubber hose world. Experience the festive glow of the night market, where dazzling lights, lively crowds, and whimsical characters bring every region to life.


  • Improve your collection and discover new experiences with every single journey.
  • Keep track of your journey with the in-depth Journal, recording every item bought, sold, and used in each journey.
  • Enjoy a uniquely appealing rubber hose art style, blending exotic charm with the colorful and lively atmosphere of a bustling night market.

products.name: Tales of Berseria Remastered
products.description:
Tales of Berseria returns with enhanced playability and quality-of-life enhancements!

Engage in the ultimate quest for self-discovery, remastered for the first time. The sacred kingdom awaits the arrival of its savior, and a lone woman named Velvet is marked by traumatic deceit. Join Velvet on her journey for vengeance, along with her cast of eccentric companions, as they sail through the archipelago which comprises the kingdom of Midgand.

• A Tale of Emotion Versus Reason

Let emotions guide your destiny, or maintain order with the power of reason. Witness the eternal struggle between the head and the heart as Velvet is challenged to stand by her convictions while the world around her compresses into a system of order.

• An Exhilarating Combat System

Freely choose Artes to suit your playstyle and perform a variety of combos. Collect enemy Souls to unleash a barrage of attacks for a thrilling battle experience.

• A Modern, High-Quality Retelling

Useful features like destination markers and the ability to disable enemy encounters make traversing the islands of Midgand all the more enticing. Visit the famous Grade Shop from the game's opening. Get a smooth play experience only found in this remaster!

• Access DLC from the First Iteration

This version features several DLC from the original 2016 version. A treasure trove of content awaits you, such as outfits for your characters from the previous Tales Of games along with useful equipment for your travels.

*A Deluxe Edition is also available. Be careful of duplicate purchases.

products.name: Tales of Berseria Remastered: Deluxe Edition
products.description:
The Deluxe Edition includes:

• Tales of Berseria Remastered

• Battle BGM Pack

• Digital Artbook & Soundtrack

• Super Growth Support Herb Set

Tales of Berseria returns with enhanced playability and quality-of-life enhancements!

Engage in the ultimate quest for self-discovery, remastered for the first time. The sacred kingdom awaits the arrival of its savior, and a lone woman named Velvet is marked by traumatic deceit. Join Velvet on her journey for vengeance, along with her cast of eccentric companions, as they sail through the archipelago which comprises the kingdom of Midgand.

• A Tale of Emotion Versus Reason

Let emotions guide your destiny, or maintain order with the power of reason. Witness the eternal struggle between the head and the heart as Velvet is challenged to stand by her convictions while the world around her compresses into a system of order.

• An Exhilarating Combat System

Freely choose Artes to suit your playstyle and perform a variety of combos. Collect enemy Souls to unleash a barrage of attacks for a thrilling battle experience.

• A Modern, High-Quality Retelling

Useful features like destination markers and the ability to disable enemy encounters make traversing the islands of Midgand all the more enticing. Visit the famous Grade Shop from the game's opening. Get a smooth play experience only found in this remaster!

• Access DLC from the First Iteration

This version features several DLC from the original 2016 version. A treasure trove of content awaits you, such as outfits for your characters from the previous Tales Of games along with useful equipment for your travels.

*A Standard Edition is also available. Be careful of duplicate purchases.

products.name: Armored Brigade II: Scandinavia
products.description:
As the Cold War turns hot, the conflict engulfs the entire European continent. The Northern Flank, once considered a secondary theatre, now becomes a critical battleground where control of the Baltic approaches and Nordic territories could decide the fate of Europe. With this expansion, three new Nordic nations—Sweden, Norway, and Denmark—are added to the fray, bringing their unique forces, doctrines, and tactical challenges into Armored Brigade II.


SWEDEN

A neutral power caught between two blocs, albeit with secretive contacts with NATO, the Kingdom of Sweden maintained a formidable military to ensure credible armed neutrality. The doctrine of Försvarsmakten (Swedish Armed Forces) was based on a total defense concept, leveraging the country's vast forests, difficult terrain, and long coastline to delay, attrit, and ultimately stop any invader in a protracted defense.

Swedish equipment was almost entirely of indigenous design, optimized for the specific demands of Scandinavian warfare. From the revolutionary turretless Stridsvagn 103 ‘S-Tank’ to rugged vehicles like the Pbv 302 and the ubiquitous Centurions, Swedish units are highly specialized. Their unique structure and emphasis on decentralized, mobile defense makes them a wildcard. On the battlefield, they are an unpredictable force, masters of ambush and layered defense.


NORWAY

As the strategic key to NATO's northern flank, Norway's commanding location was critical for controlling the Soviet Navy's access to the Atlantic. Its long coastline and vital ice-free ports made it both a priceless asset and a vulnerable target. The Norwegian Army's doctrine was entirely shaped by its geography: deep fjords, steep valleys, and limited road networks. Their strategy was one of aggressive delay, using light, mobile forces to block choke points, inflict heavy casualties, and buy time for NATO reinforcements.

Norwegians were experts in mountain and arctic warfare, fielding specialized troops and exploiting their home-field advantage. Their equipment was a mix of WWII surplus, licensed domestic production, and imported equipment from Western allies, particularly the United States and Germany. Playing as Norway is a tactical challenge of trading space for time, where every valley and mountain pass must be turned into a killing ground.


DENMARK

As the gatekeeper of the Baltic Sea, Denmark's role in NATO was to help hold the Schleswig-Holstein front line, bottling up the Soviet Baltic Fleet and preventing a thrust into the North German Plain. The Danish Army was a compact but robust force, built around a small peacetime core designed to be expanded with mobilized troops and NATO reinforcements. While smaller than its neighbors, the Danish army was well-equipped, motivated, and designed to serve as a solid, reliable bulwark alongside its West German and NATO counterparts. Theirs is a story of holding the line against overwhelming odds, where every unit counts and retreat is not an option.


FEATURES

  • Three new playable armies: Sweden, Norway, and Denmark
  • Over 250 new units and aircraft
  • A brand-new Swedish map
  • A new linear campaign

products.name: WEGO World War II: Overlord
products.description:
WEGO World War II: Overlord is an operational-level, ground-centric WEGOWW2 game system. Built on the engine of Desert War/Stalingrad, this hex-based wargame recreates the Allied invasion of Western Europe. The game includes 14 historical scenarios, ranging from the landing at Omaha beach to a huge 135-turn campaign that covers the entire Normandy campaign. The game can be played by both sides using hotseat, versus the AI, or PBEM multiplayer.


WEGOWW2: In many board and computer wargames, one side will move its units and resolve combat, followed by the other side repeating the process. This game mechanic is known as IGOUGO ("I GO YOU GO"). WEGO World War II is different. WEGO by its nature is about the player's ability to plan for and manage chaos; to find solutions to perceived challenges and accomplish the mission with the tools at hand. Despite the fog of war where the position and strength of enemy units is unknown, against a thinking opponent who must problem-solve and plan under the same conditions. Every decision you make must be carefully considered. Learn to think three moves ahead to outsmart your opponent!


WEGO World War II: Overlord includes multiple interconnected campaigns and stand-alone scenarios, featuring the iconic battles across Normandy’s hedgerows, the breakout towards Brittany, and the struggle for key cities like Caen and Cherbourg. The game uses stylized maps of Normandy over which a hexagonal grid system has been superimposed. This grid regulates land unit placement, movement, and combat.


Ground units range in size from company to regiment/brigade level and are represented on the game map using counters with stylized or NATO icons to display unit types.


Air assets represent Allied and German air groups that can conduct counter-air, interdiction, air resupply, bombardment, and ground support missions. Air reconnaissance assets can collect critical information about enemy location, unit types, and strengths.

Weather is modeled and can significantly influence air operations, supply efficiency, and airborne missions.


Naval assets represent the powerful Allied naval forces that supported the landings and subsequent operations. These assets can conduct naval gunfire bombardment, provide logistical support, and facilitate amphibious landings across multiple beaches.


Airborne and glider forces play a pivotal role, allowing players to execute daring operations behind enemy lines to seize key terrain, disrupt supply lines, or block enemy reinforcements.


Ground Assets provide additional capabilities that can influence the outcome of on-map battles. Ground Assets include electronic warfare capabilities and command activities, and specialized logistic actions, while logistics Assets provide essential resources that enhance movement, combat effectiveness, or replacements priority for player-selected units or formations. Securing supply lines and managing logistical constraints is critical to sustaining momentum during the invasion.

products.name: Warhammer 40,000: Battlesector - Black Legion
products.description:
Sons of Horus 

The Black Legion are the latest faction to invade Warhammer 40,000: Battlesector. Fifteen new units bring the Warmaster’s wrath to the galaxy and devastation to all who stand in their way.


Commanders

The Chaos Lord, among the mightiest of the Champions of Chaos, has led their treacherous warriors through countless mortal lifetimes, demanding nothing less than absolute ruthlessness from all who serve them. 

Sorcerers of Chaos twist the fate of the galaxy through forbidden rites and blasphemous pacts. They draw power from the Warp to empower their allies and annihilate their foes, though such gifts often come at a terrible price.

The Master of Executions exists for a single purpose; these single-minded axemen stride unflinchingly towards the enemy’s greatest champions and most beloved leaders, bellowing a fatal decree before crashing forward and hacking through armour, flesh and bone.

Cultist Firebrands wield their Balefire pikes at the forefront of the assault, seeking the enemy and consigning them to a fiery death. Fellow Cultists are emboldened by the flames and fight with renewed fury in their presence.


Black Legion Elites

Chaos Terminators combine unmatched resilience and a devastating arsenal. Encased in hulking armour, these murderous elites advance through storms of enemy fire, cutting down all who dare to stand before them.

The Chosen are some of the most seasoned and merciless warriors of the Black Legion — veterans of countless wars and atrocities. Granted – or having seized – their warband’s most powerful weapons, these warriors undertake the most glorious and dangerous missions, and are the bane of all that lives.

Havocs are heavy weapon specialists trained to obliterate their enemies from afar. With devastating anti-infantry and anti-armour firepower, they dominate the battlefield through relentless, punishing volleys that reduce their foes to dust and ash.

Obliterators are a monstrous fusion of flesh and metal. Having reshaped weapons from their own mutated forms, these abominations step directly from warp fissures to channel daemonic fury from their fleshmetal guns.


Engines of Destruction 

The Helbrute is a fusion of corrupted machine and tormented flesh. Armed with heavy weaponry and monstrous mechanical limbs, a Helbrute unleashes its torment upon the living in acts of savage destruction. 

The Venomcrawler is a Daemon Engine born of the Warp — a grotesque amalgam of daemon flesh and cursed iron. Driven by a ravenous hunger for flesh and souls, it rampages across the battlefield, tearing apart its victims. 

The Forgefiend is a Daemon Engine designed to unleash devastating barrages of hell-forged weaponry. Its massive forelimbs are replaced by daemonic gun-mounts, spewing warp-tainted munitions that tear through armour and flesh with equal ease.

Chaos Rhinos are ancient armoured transports that have been corrupted by centuries of exposure to the Warp. Despite their taint, they remain as durable and dependable as ever, carrying allies safely through the fires of battle.


Remorseless Forces of the Black Legion

Chaos Legionaries are once-loyal warriors of the Imperium who turned their back on the Emperor during the Horus Heresy. Powered by endless hatred and the dark gifts of the warp, they stride forth to crush all who stand in front of them. Whether millennia-old veterans of the Long War or traitors from Renegade warbands, Legionaries are deadly and adaptable warriors.

The Raptors are sadistic killers who strike from above to sow panic and death. With screeching battle cries amplified to terrify their prey, they descend upon the enemy’s weakest points, reveling in the slaughter of the helpless and the fearful.

Chaos Cultists are mortal devotees of the Dark Gods. Under the command of mighty Heretic warlords, these crudely-armed fanatics swarm to war in vast, frenzied mobs, eager to shed blood in the name of their blasphemous masters. 


Command Support

The Heldrake is a winged Daemon Engine forged from metal and malice. When not tearing enemy aircraft apart, they streak across the battlefield and turn their blazing weapons upon those below.
